text:
You are working on beads issue flt-it8.32.7: "TDD Guard Claude hooks" (P1 task).

## Issue Details
Add shared Claude Code hook config and a safe wrapper so tdd-guard can enforce red-green-refactor locally without breaking setups where it is not installed.

## Plan Reference
See docs/plans/claude-governance-hardening.md (Phase 3). Deliverables:
- shared Claude hook config
- wrapper script for safe local execution
- install docs

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/tdd-guard"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## Instructions
1. Read CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md for project conventions
2. Check existing .claude/ structure and .githooks/ directory
3. Create Claude Code hook configuration that integrates tdd-guard
4. Create a wrapper script (e.g., scripts/tdd-guard-wrapper.sh) that:
   - Checks if tdd-guard is installed
   - If installed, runs it with appropriate config
   - If not installed, exits 0 with informational message (never blocks)
5. Document installation in a clear section

## Quality Gate
This is a config/scripts change. Verify scripts are executable and wrapper handles missing tdd-guard gracefully.

## Completion
When done, commit all changes, push your branch, and report back with summary and any concerns.

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773197444805-57semmv","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"file_path":"/home/ketan/project/flotsam/.claude/worktrees/worktree/tdd-guard/scripts/hooks/claude-tdd-guard.sh","content":"#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

if command -v tdd-guard >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  exec tdd-guard "$@"
fi

exit 0
"},"permission_updates":[]}}
